name: Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt. Set aside.
3. Combine sugar, beaten eggs, oil, sour cream, and vanilla in a bowl; beat well.
4. Blend the wet ingredients into the dry ingredient mixture.
5. Fold in chopped apples and nuts.
6. Pour the batter into two greased and floured loaf pans.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until the loaves are done.
